hooks.command: echo 'COMPACTION GUIDANCE: Preserve code changes, key decisions, and file paths. Discard intermediate attempts, explanations, and verbose tool output.'

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' compact-capture --trigger auto --quiet; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' compact-restore --compact; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' compact-restore --new-session-only; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' compact-capture --trigger stop --quiet; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 || continue; "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' collect --quiet && $(command -v python3 || command -v python || echo py -3) '$MEASURE_PY' dashboard --quiet; exit; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' compact-capture --trigger end --quiet; done; exit 0

for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/token-optimizer}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" '$MEASURE_PY' quality-cache --warn --quiet; done; exit 0
echo 'File modified. Skip formatting explanations. The formatter handles it.'
